nasb.text: They said to one another, “Who did this thing?” And when they searched about and inquired, they said, “Gideon the son of Joash did this thing.”

esv.text: And they said to one another, “Who has done this thing?” And after they had searched and inquired, they said, “Gideon the son of Joash has done this thing.”

cnv.text: 就彼此說：“誰作了這事呢？”他們追查尋訪之後，就說：“是約阿施的兒子基甸作的。”

ccb.text: 他们彼此议论说：“这是谁干的？”他们仔细调查后得知是约阿施的儿子基甸所为，
